mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_exam_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY attempt_number DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_exam_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND exam_id = #{examId}

SELECT ser.record_id as recordId, ser.student_id as studentId, s.stu_name as studentName, ser.exam_id as examId, e.exam_title as examTitle, ser.start_time as startTime, DATE_FORMAT(ser.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as submitTime, ser.total_score as totalScore, ser.student_score as studentScore, ser.pass_status as passStatus, ser.exam_status as examStatus, ser.attempt_number as attemptNumber, ser.time_used as timeUsed, ser.create_time as createTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answer sa WHERE sa.record_id = ser.record_id) as totalAnswers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answer sa INNER JOIN question q ON sa.question_id = q.question_id WHERE sa.record_id = ser.record_id AND q.question_type > 3) as subjectiveCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_answer sa INNER JOIN question q ON sa.question_id = q.question_id WHERE sa.record_id = ser.record_id AND q.question_type > 3 AND sa.student_score IS NULL) as ungradedCount FROM student_exam_record ser INNER JOIN student s ON ser.student_id = s.stu_id INNER JOIN exam e ON ser.exam_id = e.exam_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} AND ser.exam_status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY ser.submit_time DESC
